name: Lean Six Sigma Awareness — Operations Staff
description: Assess whether operations and production staff understand core Lean Six Sigma concepts being introduced across the facility. Focus on the 8 wastes (DOWNTIME), 5S workplace organisation, value stream thinking, basic DMAIC problem-solving approach, and standard work documentation. Participants should be able to identify waste in their own work area and contribute to improvement initiatives.
targetAudience: Production operators, team leaders, supervisors, operations staff
